candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; included only because it was in the candidate list.

variables.notes: Selected the direct balance-sheet total for current assets.

candidates.why: Direct match for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet; preferred over cash-only or cash flow labels.
Cash only, narrower than cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash should not be the main CHE measure when cash and cash equivalents is reported separately.
Cash flow ending balance agrees conceptually, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: R:nc. Used the balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line, which is the target definition.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Cash flow movement, not balance sheet stock.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean total for short-term debt/current interest-bearing liabilities, but not in shortlist.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Clean non-lease current portion of long-term debt, but may miss other short-term borrowings if total current interest-bearing liabilities exists.
Candidate shortlist item, but appears to include lease current maturities given equality to total current interest-bearing liabilities in some years.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because baseline STD excludes leases. Avoided 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' and 'Current maturities' since they appear to include lease current portions in some years, and avoided double counting with lease-specific rows.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct tax payable line on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Direct reported PPE line; preferred total/net PPE measure.
Could represent gross tangible assets, but values are blank and net PPE is preferred when reported directly.
Only a component/other category, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use assets are a component and not preferred over the direct total PPE line.

variables.notes: Used the direct PPE line; this is the preferred reported total/net PPE measure.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operations before capital expenditure
candidates.why: Related operating cash flow subtotal, but not the standard reported net operating cash flow when the direct line exists.

variables.notes: Selected the standard net cash flow from operating activities line.
